      • sendPing(ws: WebSocketConnection; data: openArray[byte] = [])

      • sendText(ws: WebSocketConnection; s: string)

      • setOnError(ws: ptr WebSocketConnectionImpl; cb: ErrorCb)
        setOnMessage
      • setOnMessage(ws: ptr WebSocketConnectionImpl; cb: MessageCb)
        setOnOpen
      • setOnOpen(ws: ptr WebSocketConnectionImpl; cb: OpenCb)
        websocketUpgrade
      • websocketUpgrade(req: ptr evhttp_request; onOpen: OpenCb = nil; onMessage: MessageCb = nil; onClose: CloseCb = nil; onError: ErrorCb = nil): WebSocketConnection

This module provides WebSocket support using Libevent. It can be used to perform WebSocket upgrades in HTTP handlers and manage WebSocket connections with callbacks for open, message, close, and error events. The implementation handles WebSocket framing, including fragmentation and control frames, according to RFC6455.

Types

CloseCb = proc (conn: ptr WebSocketConnectionImpl; code: int; reason: string) {.
    ...gcsafe.}
Called when a WebSocket connection is closed. code is the close code (e.g., 1000 for normal closure). reason provides an optional human-readable explanation. 
ErrorCb = proc (conn: ptr WebSocketConnectionImpl; err: string) {....gcsafe.}
Called when an error occurs on the WebSocket connection. err contains a description of the error. 
MessageCb = proc (conn: ptr WebSocketConnectionImpl; opcode: int;
                  data: openArray[byte]) {....gcsafe.}
Called when a complete WebSocket message is received. opcode indicates the message type (e.g., text, binary). data contains the message payload. 
OpenCb = proc (req: ptr WebSocketConnectionImpl) {....gcsafe.}
Called when a new WebSocket connection is established. The req parameter provides access to the connection and request details. 
WebSocketConnection = ref WebSocketConnectionImpl
Reference type wrapper around WebSocketConnectionImpl for easier usage in application code. 
WebSocketConnectionImpl = object
  id*: cint                  ## Unique identifier for the connection, typically the underlying socket fd.
  bev*: ptr bufferevent      ## Pointer to the libevent bufferevent associated with this connection.
  onMessage*: MessageCb      ## Callback for handling incoming messages.
  onClose*: CloseCb          ## Callback for handling connection closures.
  onError*: ErrorCb          ## Callback for handling errors.
  onOpen*: OpenCb            ## Callback for handling new connections.
Internal implementation of a WebSocket connection. 
WebSocketFrameKind = enum
  wsNone, wsText, wsBinary, wsClose, wsPing, wsPong
WebSocket frame opcodes as defined in RFC6455.

Procs

proc close(c: ptr WebSocketConnectionImpl; code: int = 1000; reason = "") {.
    ...raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Close the WebSocket connection with an optional close code and reason. 
proc close(ws: WebSocketConnection; code: int = 1000; reason = "") {.
    ...raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Close the WebSocket connection from a WebSocketConnection reference with an optional close code and reason. If the connection is nil, this is a no-op. 
proc sendBinary(c: ptr WebSocketConnectionImpl; data: openArray[byte]) {.
    ...raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Send a binary message as a WebSocket frame. If the data is empty, send an empty frame. 
proc sendBinary(ws: WebSocketConnection; data: openArray[byte]) {.
    ...raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Send a binary message from a WebSocketConnection reference. If the connection is nil, this is a no-op. 
proc sendFrame(c: ptr WebSocketConnectionImpl; opcode: int;
               payload: openArray[byte]) {....raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Send a WebSocket frame with the given opcode and payload. 
proc sendFrame(ws: WebSocketConnection; opcode: int; payload: openArray[byte]) {.
    ...raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Send a WebSocket frame from a WebSocketConnection reference. If the connection is nil, this is a no-op. 
proc sendPing(c: ptr WebSocketConnectionImpl; data: openArray[byte] = []) {.
    ...raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Send a ping frame with optional payload. If no data is provided, send an empty ping. 
proc sendPing(ws: WebSocketConnection; data: openArray[byte] = []) {.
    ...raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Send a ping frame from a WebSocketConnection reference. If the connection is nil, this is a no-op. 
proc sendText(c: ptr WebSocketConnectionImpl; s: string) {....raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Send a text message as a WebSocket frame. If the string is empty, send an empty frame. 
proc sendText(ws: WebSocketConnection; s: string) {....raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Send a text message from a WebSocketConnection reference. If the connection is nil, this is a no-op. 
proc setOnClose(ws: ptr WebSocketConnectionImpl; cb: CloseCb) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc setOnError(ws: ptr WebSocketConnectionImpl; cb: ErrorCb) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc setOnMessage(ws: ptr WebSocketConnectionImpl; cb: MessageCb) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc setOnOpen(ws: ptr WebSocketConnectionImpl; cb: OpenCb) {....raises: [],
    tags: [], forbids: [].}
proc websocketUpgrade(req: ptr evhttp_request; onOpen: OpenCb = nil;
                      onMessage: MessageCb = nil; onClose: CloseCb = nil;
                      onError: ErrorCb = nil): WebSocketConnection {.
    ...raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
